sections.short-biography: Yang Jin, a former pirate, offers to join in Fan Shui Guan. From Capcom’s Destiny of an Emperor.
sections.biography-source-undefined:
Yang Jin is a fictional character who appears in Capcom’s Destiny of an Emperor, released in 1988 for the Nintendo Entertainment System. While his name may be an incorrect Romanization of a known figure from the period, it is also possible he is a unique character created for this game, like others such as Huo Hu, Song Yong, and Song Ren.

You meet Yang Jin after starting chapter II, in Fan Shui Guan (Si River Pass) on your way to Hu Lao Guan (Tiger Trap Pass). He introduces himself as a pirate, and offers to join Liu Bei’s party.

Yang Jin is a fictional character who appears in Capcom’s Destiny of an Emperor, released in 1988 for the Nintendo Entertainment System. While his name may be an incorrect Romanization of a known figure from the period, it is also possible he is a unique character created for this game, like others such asHuo Hu,Song Yong, andSong Ren.
You meet Yang Jin after starting chapter II, in Fan Shui Guan (Si River Pass) on your way to Hu Lao Guan (Tiger Trap Pass). He introduces himself as a pirate, and offers to join Liu Bei’s party.
